title: Ukraine’s Minister of Defense, a Proponent of Drone Warfare, Is Forced Out
summary_full: Mykhailo Fedorov announced he was leaving the ministry on Wednesday after conflicts with generals and military contractors over the role of innovative weaponry.
summary_public: Mykhailo Fedorov announced he was leaving the ministry on Wednesday after conflicts with generals and military contractors over the role of innovative weaponry.
